title: SOUN vs. BBAI — Which Small-Cap AI Stock Offers Higher Upside Post-Q1 Earnings?
text: Comparison of SOUN vs BBAI as small-cap AI stocks post-Q1 earnings. BigBear.ai (BBAI) faces competition from other AI-focused small-cap stocks. Post-earnings analysis shows BBAI's strong backlog growth and margin expansion are positive factors, but the company's profitability challenges present risks compared to some peers. The competitive AI landscape in defense and federal markets continues to intensify with multiple companies vying for government contracts.
